# Children Do English

> Free English vocabulary learning app for kids ages 6-12

## Overview

Children Do English is a free, ad-free, privacy-first web app that helps children build English vocabulary through interactive quizzes, flashcards, and spaced repetition. It supports bilingual Hebrew-English learning and works offline as a Progressive Web App.

## Key Facts

- URL: https://childrendoenglish.com
- Price: Free (no ads, no subscriptions, no in-app purchases)
- Target age: 6-12 years old
- Words: 303 curated words across 13 categories
- Languages: English interface with full Hebrew translation
- Privacy: All data stored locally, no accounts, COPPA-compliant
- Offline: PWA — installable and fully functional offline
- Multi-player: Supports multiple child profiles on one device

## Categories

Animals, Food, Home, Transport, Nature, Colors, Numbers, Clothing, School, Sports, Feelings, Everyday, Toys

## Learning Modes

- Image Quiz: Match a word to the correct photo
- Word Quiz: Choose the right definition
- Flashcards: Study words with images, definitions, and audio
- Listen & Match: Audio-based quiz for pre-readers
- Daily Review: Spaced repetition review of learned words

## Difficulty Levels

- Beginner (ages 6-8): ~100 common everyday words
- Intermediate (ages 9-10): ~100 more advanced words
- Advanced (ages 11-12): ~100 challenging vocabulary words

## Features

- Spaced repetition algorithm (intervals: 1, 3, 7, 14, 30 days)
- Real photographs for every word (512x512 WebP)
- Text-to-speech pronunciation
- Hebrew translations for all words
- Pre-reader mode for children who can't read yet
- Progress tracking with badges and streaks
- Parent dashboard for monitoring progress
- Dark mode support

## Content Pages

- 303 individual word pages: https://childrendoenglish.com/vocabulary/{category}/{word}/
- 13 category pages: https://childrendoenglish.com/vocabulary/{category}/
- 13 bilingual Hebrew-English category pages: https://childrendoenglish.com/vocabulary/{category}/hebrew/
- 13 printable flashcard sets: https://childrendoenglish.com/printable-flashcards/{category}/
- 3 age-bracket pages: https://childrendoenglish.com/vocabulary/ages-{range}/
- 7 educational guides: https://childrendoenglish.com/guides/
- About page: https://childrendoenglish.com/about/

## Creator

Built by Oded Deckelbaum, a software developer and parent in Israel.
